title: EVA FEAR — 'Does it HURT?'
prompt: Tight medium shot in @living-room — soft warm morning light. @Mama sits on the rainbow afghan couch holding @Eva on her lap. Eva clutches the front of Mama's sweater with both hands, curls pressed against her cheek, eyes huge and worried, lower lip wobbling. Mama strokes Eva's hair gently, calm and warm. Eva (small worried whisper): "Does it… HURT?" Mama (gentle, smiling): "Just a tickle, sweetheart. Like a little brush on your teeth." Eva (still uncertain): "…promise?" Mama (soft kiss on Eva's forehead): "Promise. And big sister will be right beside you."
